name: EQUATOR Beverage Co
summary: PART I In this report, the terms EQUATOR, EQUATOR Beverage Company, the Company, we, us, and our mean EQUATOR Beverage Company. Company Overview EQUATOR Beverage Company is a Delaware corporation headquartered in Jersey City, New Jersey. The Company is engaged in the development, production, distribution, and marketing of a portfolio of beverage products.
